# task\-gh\-cli — GitHub Issues CLI commands \(import/export\)
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-cli

Add \`waystation gh import\` and \`waystation gh export\` CLI commands as thin wrappers over the core gh module\. Import pulls issues into the ledger; export pushes ledger issues to GitHub\. Both support \-\-repo, \-\-json, and \-\-force flags\.

## Acceptance
- \`waystation gh import \-\-repo owner/name\` fetches issues from GitHub and writes them to the ledger\. Outputs count \+ ids via CommandResult envelope\.
- \`waystation gh export \-\-repo owner/name\` pushes ledger issues to GitHub\. Creates new issues for records without an existing gh\-\{number\} id\. Updates existing issues matched by gh\-\{number\} id\.
- Both commands support \-\-json for machine\-readable output and \-\-force to overwrite existing ledger records \(import\) or ignore state mismatches \(export\)\.
- Missing GITHUB\_TOKEN produces a clear error message\.
- bun:test: CLI integration test calls gh import with mock server, verifies \-\-json envelope\.
- typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate all clean\.
